headline: Mastercard Buys BVNK As Stablecoin Push Meets Valuation Debate
summary: Mastercard agreed to acquire stablecoin infrastructure firm BVNK, expanding its capabilities in digital assets and programmable payments. The deal brings on-chain value movement technology directly into Mastercard's network, with a focus on bridging fiat and crypto rails for payments. The acquisition marks a shift from partnerships toward owning core infrastructure that can support cross border and B2B transactions using stablecoins. Mastercard, traded as NYSE:MA, enters this transaction...
